Entry.JapaneseText: お前らか！ みんなをケンカに巻き込んでる ルビアとカイウスっていうのは！
Entry.EnglishText: So it's you guys! Rubia and Caius, the ones who keep going around picking fights with everyone!

Entry.JapaneseText: ちょいと調子に乗りすぎなんじゃねぇか？
Entry.EnglishText: You guys are getting a bit too carried away over here, don't you think?

Entry.JapaneseText: なによ、あなた達！？ 他人のくせに入ってこないでよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Who the heck are you people?! We don't need strangers butting in!

Entry.JapaneseText: なんでオレの名前まで 知れ渡ってるんだよ……
Entry.EnglishText: Why do they know my name, too...?

Entry.JapaneseText: このままじゃ 誰もお前達二人に近付けないだろ
Entry.EnglishText: At the rate you guys are going, nobody will be able to be friendly with you.

Entry.JapaneseText: 二人の周りを立ち入り禁止にしたいのか？
Entry.EnglishText: Are you two TRYING to be off limits to everyone around you?

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな事言ってないでしょ！ だいたい、みんなが勝手に あたし達を攻撃するのよ
Entry.EnglishText: Nobody said that! But either way, everyone's just been attacking us on their own.

Entry.JapaneseText: こりゃ話の通じる相手じゃねぇな。 仕方ねぇ。 お仕置きといくか
Entry.EnglishText: We're not dealing with someone we can have a heart-to-heart with. Nothin' else we can do about it. Gonna have to punish these guys.

Entry.JapaneseText: なによなによ、カッコつけちゃって！
Entry.EnglishText: What the heck, what the heck! Look at you, trying to act cool!

Entry.JapaneseText: みんなにもてはやされてるからってなによ！ あなたがカイウスより 上だなんてあたしは思ってないから！
Entry.EnglishText: So what if everyone idolizes you?! It won't make me think you're above Caius!
